entries.source: "Explain derivatives step by step"
entries.value: "Jelaskan derivatives step by step"

entries.source: "Help with quadratic equations"
entries.value: "Bantu dengan persamaan kuadratik"

entries.source: "Solve 2x + 5 = 17 with me"
entries.value: "Selesaikan 2x + 5 = 17 bersama saya"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Math Step Coach on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Panduan praktikal untuk menggunakan Jurulatih Langkah Matematik di inspir bagi pembelajaran stem, dengan prompt, gelung belajar, dan tabiat AI yang lebih selamat.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: A lebih kuat gelung belajar

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tutor AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Minta AI menyemak penaakulan anda, bukan hanya hasilnya.

entries.source: Check each step.
entries.value: Semak each step.

entries.source: Choose a first move.
entries.value: Pilih a pertama move.

entries.source: Explain why the method works.
entries.value: Jelaskan mengapa method works.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish oleh writing idea back daripada memory.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Pelajar yang ingin melihat sebab setiap langkah matematik berfungsi, bukan sekadar menyalin jawapan.

entries.source: Math Step Coach
entries.value: Jurulatih Langkah Matematik

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Jurulatih Langkah Matematik Untuk Solving Problems Dengan Understanding ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Solve math oleh understanding each step. Anda coach checks anda work, points out slips, dan builds confidence.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Jurulatih Langkah Matematik Untuk Understanding: praktikal panduan

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompt untuk dicuba

entries.source: Start the live mode at Math Step Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Science Lab Partner. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Mulakan mod langsung di Jurulatih Langkah Matematik. Jika anda mahukan format pembelajaran berdekatan, cuba Rakan Makmal Sains. Untuk pandangan platform yang lebih luas, baca perkara yang patut dilakukan oleh rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell mod apa anda ialah trying untuk belajar atau produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Itu difference shows up dalam flow. Bukannya one giant response, terbaik sessions move melalui loop: set goal, try something, get feedback, baiki lemah spot, dan pilih seterusnya action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Fokus itu penting. Chatbot umum boleh menjawab hampir apa sahaja, tetapi mod pembelajaran memberi bentuk kepada perbualan. Ia mengarah anda kepada jenis pemikiran, latihan, maklum balas, atau penerokaan yang membantu idea melekat.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Aliran ini menyemak setiap langkah, menunjukkan kesilapan, dan menghubungkan prosedur kembali kepada konsep.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ini ialah same habit behind belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself: keep pelajar active. AI ialah most berguna apabila ia gives anda feedback di anda pemikiran.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Mod ini amat berguna untuk pelajar yang mahu:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Try step dalam anda own words.

entries.source: Use Math Step Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gunakan Jurulatih Langkah Matematik apabila anda mahukan sesi yang bermula cepat tetapi masih menyesuaikan diri dengan anda. Matlamat pertama bukan untuk kedengaran hebat. Matlamat pertama ialah menjadikan langkah seterusnya terasa mampu dilakukan.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Perkara yang dibantu oleh mod ini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ke mana seterusnya

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Anda juga boleh bermula dengan versi kasar masalah sebenar anda. Prompt pertama yang bersepah tidak mengapa. Sesi boleh menjelaskan tahap, khalayak, tarikh akhir, dan gaya selepas anda bermula.
